that the accused 143 arrested police on 30.082O15 and since then he is confined in jail; that as per FIR the accused has becn assigned the role of causing firearm injury to deccased Allah Dino on his right wrist but in post mortem report no injury un right wrist of Ihe deceased has been shuwn; however it discloses an injury on the lelt wrist uf the deceased which is not vital part of the body and the vicarious liability, if any, shall be determined after full fledged trial In tne case, nence the accused is entitled to the cuncession of bail In support of his contentions, the learned Counsel has ICfLFTLd the case of Ibol Ahned and unother u.|11L0 1930 2006(ش$9 Conversely, Learned counsel for the cumplainant has opposed this application on the grounds that the accusud is nominated in the promptly lodged F.IR Ihe commission murder Of deceased Allah Dinu 8hares common objcct with the cO accused Wahid Hux and Ihc alleged offence Qatl--4md punishable 101 death, imprisonment for life Imprisonment up 25 ycars falls within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr PC;
